message:
feat(demo): add mouse + keyboard shortcuts to VOI Overlay (bd-iuvb.17.13.8)

- VoiSection enum for focusable overlay sections (Decision, Posterior, Observation, Ledger)
- Mouse click-to-focus on overlay sections with Cell<Rect> layout caching
- Mouse scroll for ledger navigation
- Keyboard: v (toggle detail), n/p/Up/Down (ledger nav), Tab (cycle section), Esc (clear focus)
- Status bar with focus state and keybinding hints
- Focus-dependent border styling
- Expanded detail mode with ledger index indicator
- 12 new tests for mouse and keyboard interactions
- Fix ResponsiveDemo keybindings (+/- for width adjustment)
- Fix terminal_capabilities &char cast

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
